scripts.start: docker compose up -d db && docker compose -f edge/docker-compose/docker-compose.yaml up -d
scripts.stop: docker compose down && docker compose -f edge/docker-compose/docker-compose.yaml down
scripts.dev: docker compose up -d db && docker compose -f edge/docker-compose/docker-compose.yaml up -d && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
